strengths: Experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB at Optilyz and re:cinq
Recent work in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, code generators) matching emerging tech needs
Strong full-stack background with demonstrated scalability work (e.g., millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
concerns: No explicit experience with Nest.js or Vitest mentioned in the resume
Limited evidence of Kubernetes/deployment expertise beyond GISCollective's mention
No direct experience with Kotlin/Java despite secondary tech requirement
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong TypeScript/Node.js/React experience and recent AI-agent work, aligning well with primary stack and emerging tech. However, absence of Nest.js/Vitest and limited Java/Kotlin evidence reduces backend alignment. The high weight on backend stack mismatch offsets the positive factors.
